description: Computes and visualizes the direction cosines of a 3D vector.
utility: Find direction cosines of a 3D vector

arguments.name: vector
arguments.description: Vector to compute direction cosines for

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2, 3, c(red))
dc = dircos3d(G, V)
